name: zvideo_flip_to_gdi_if_attached
description: zVideo_dd::FlipToGDIIfAttached skips safely when the DirectDraw2 provider is absent or no attached backbuffer is active.
known_limits: The smoke covers the safe null-provider and no-attached-backbuffer paths used by initialization and FMV callers.
Binary-safe verification remains pending for the DirectDraw2 FlipToGDISurface provider dispatch path.
